◎简　　介  

　　记得很早就开始喜欢这个西班牙CULT片大师的东西了，三年多前吧，他也是我喜欢上西班牙电影的最初原因。Little known masterpiece. One of the greatest Spanish MoviesGet hold of it if you can. Best vampires movie ever without even showing any teeth...If you thing you are committed to your work, see the protagonist of this movie.The director had to adapt to stern constrains in number of characters and locales and still he came up...
